meta.title: ScriptlyStore Product Manager
meta.description: List, create, update, or delete premium digital products on ScriptlyStore.

api.name: listProducts
api.description: Retrieve catalog list of products from ScriptlyStore.

published.description: Filter by listing status (true or false)

api.name: createProduct
api.description: Register and publish a new product on ScriptlyStore.

title.description: The display title of the product

shortDescription.description: A brief one-liner summary of the product

category.description: Category slug, e.g. ui-kits, boilerplates, scripts, landing-pages

price.description: Price in paise (INR cents, e.g. 2900 paise = 29.00 INR)

thumbnail.description: jsDelivr URL of the thumbnail image

previewGif.description: jsDelivr URL of the preview GIF/WebP

fileUrl.description: Protected download file path or URL

published.description: Whether the product is listed publicly

api.name: getProduct
api.description: Retrieve detailed information about a single product.

api.name: updateProduct
api.description: Modify an existing product on ScriptlyStore.

id_or_slug.description: The product UUID or slug to update

title.description: The display title of the product

published.description: Whether the product is listed publicly

api.name: deleteProduct
api.description: Delete a product from ScriptlyStore permanently.

id_or_slug.description: The product UUID or slug to delete
